programme.title: 2015. Hol Horse age de acordo com a profecia do livro, mas começa a questionar tudo quando Jotaro e o resto do grupo aparecem. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E37

programme.title: 2015. Avdol procura informações sobre a mansão de DIO no Cairo. Iggy enfrenta dois cães ameaçadores durante um passeio pela cidade. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.sub-title: O guardião do inferno Pet Shop – Parte 1
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E38

programme.title: 2015. Iggy foge para o rio após se ferir gravemente na luta contra Petto Shoppu, mas não dá sinais de que vai desistir. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.sub-title: O guardião do inferno Pet Shop – Parte 2
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E39

programme.title: 2015. Jotaro e seu grupo são recebidos na porta da mansão de DIO por um mordomo chamado D’Arby, que alega ser irmão mais novo de D’Arby, o apostador. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E40

programme.title: 2015. Kakyoin perde a alma em um jogo de corrida contra D’Arby. Joseph escolhe um jogo que é a especialidade do mordomo e leva uma bronca de Jotaro. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E41

programme.title: 2015. Mesmo estranhando as atitudes de Jotaro, D'Arby se mantém confiante graças ao Stand. Avdol e os outros entram na mansão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.sub-title: O miasma do vazio, Cool Ice – Parte 1
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E42

programme.title: 2015. Polnareff e Iggy vão com tudo para destruir DIO, mas o terrível vampiro Cool Ice ataca os dois de surpresa. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.sub-title: O miasma do vazio, Cool Ice – Parte 2
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E43

programme.title: 2015. Gravemente ferido, Iggy usa suas últimas forças para salvar Polnareff, que aproveita para ferir Cool Ice na cabeça. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.sub-title: O miasma do vazio, Cool Ice – Parte 3
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E44

programme.title: 2015. Polnareff finalmente enfrenta DIO, mas não consegue se aproximar. De longe, ele libera sua arma secreta para revelar o Stand de seu terrível oponente. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E45

programme.title: 2015. Kakyoin quer revelar a identidade do Stand de DIO, e para isso usa seu próprio Stand em um ataque concentrado. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E46

programme.title: 2015. DIO usa seu Stand e consegue parar o tempo, mas quando vai atacar, percebe que os dedos de Jotaro estão se mexendo. Quem vencerá esta batalha? Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E47

programme.title: 2015. DIO contempla sua vitória. Enfurecido, Jotaro enfrenta seu inimigo em uma batalha final. O cenário? Um mundo em que o tempo está congelado. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.sub-title: O adeus da longa jornada, amigos
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E48

programme.title: 2016. Jotaro Kujo vai para a cidade de Morioh à procura de Josuke Higashikata. Ele vê alguém que acaba sendo Josuke se desculpando com uns valentões. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E01

programme.title: 2016. O Stand de Angelo consegue entrar no corpo das pessoas. Apesar de Jotaro avisar para não consumirem nada, Josuke surpreende a mãe tomando um gole de café. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E02

programme.title: 2016. Para proteger a cidade, Jotaro quer destruir o misterioso arco e flecha que despertou o poder do Stand de Angelo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E03

programme.title: 2016. Para tentar salvar Koichi, Josuke vai à casa de Okuyasu Nijimura, mas é atacado por seu irmão, Keicho. Josuke propõe um acordo a Okuyasu, que está ferido. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E04

programme.title: 2016. Josuke e Koichi decidem encontrar o arco e flecha e destruí-lo para impedir que haja mais vítimas. Eles o encontram no sótão, mas escutam um som estranho. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E05

programme.title: 2016. A caminho da escola de bicicleta, Koichi atropela um gato dentro de um saco. Um homem vê o acidente e chantageia Koichi, exigindo que ele pague pelo enterro do animal. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E06

programme.title: 2016. Josuke e Koichi tentam descobrir se o colega de escola Toshikazu Hazamada está mesmo usando um Stand e encontram um boneco de madeira no armário dele. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E07

programme.title: 2016. A colega de escola Yukako Yamagishi confessa seu amor por Koichi. Ele fica muito feliz, mas ela acaba indo longe demais. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E08

programme.title: 2016. Koichi tenta fugir, mas é impedido por Yukako e perde a esperança. Quando ela vai até um telefone público, algo inesperado acontece. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E09

programme.title: 2016. Josuke e Okuyasu vão a um novo restaurante italiano que é meio esquisito. Okuyasu acha a água deliciosa, mas seu corpo tem uma reação estranha. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E10

programme.title: 2016. Red Hot Chili Pepper, que matou Keicho e roubou o arco e flecha, aparece diante de Josuke. Jotaro conta a Josuke e aos outros dois sobre um cara. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E11

programme.title: 2016. Seguindo as ordens de Jotaro, Josuke e Koichi ficam no porto e procuram Chili Pepper. O usuário do Stand aparece e acredita que pode vencê-los. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E12

programme.title: 2016. Josuke reluta, mas tenta convencer o pai a voltar para casa. Joseph causa todo tipo de problema e diz que um usuário de Stand está por perto. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E13

programme.title: 2016. Koichi e Hazamada estão felizes de visitar a casa do famoso artista de mangá Rohan Kishibe, mas logo se assustam com ele. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.sub-title: Vamos para a casa do desenhista – Parte 1
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E14

programme.title: 2016. Rohan diz que Koichi o inspira a criar um mangá. Quando ele está prestes a aproveitar Koichi para sua arte, alguém bate à porta. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.sub-title: Vamos para a casa do desenhista – Parte 2
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E15

programme.title: 2016. Jotaro pede ajuda a Josuke para caçar um rato que consegue usar um Stand. Depois, eles encontram algo bizarro no canal de irrigação onde o rato foi visto. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E16

programme.desc: Michael finally gets the house to himself when a blackout occurs.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Jr.'s Risky Business
programme.desc: A furious Michael considers throwing Jr. out of the house after catching him in a compromising position with his girlfriend (Meagan Good).

programme.desc: Daniel's brother, Lionel, visits and sibling rivalry takes over; Toni tries to improve the school's dress code.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Mann's New Church
programme.desc: Toni wants to join a new church which frustrates Lorraine and a rift runs through the family; DJ has tryouts at school but is a little over-enthusiastic.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Mann's Payback
programme.desc: The family learns that a criminal Daniel put away years ago is released, and they are concerned for his safety; Toni tries to bond with DJ through video gaming.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Manns to Make Her Dance

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Undercover Mann
programme.desc: Daniel and Michael go undercover to catch an art thief; Michelle visits and is excited to help DJ with a school assignment.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Mann Up

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Miracle Mann
programme.desc: Tasha thinks she has healing powers when her goldfish dies and comes back to life; Michael's father comes to visit.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Here Comes the Judge
programme.desc: When Steve's students take him court for a classroom injustice, he goes before TV's Judge Greg Mathis.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - House Party
programme.desc: Cedric and Lovita pressure apartment-sitting Romeo to throw a party while Steve and Regina are out of town.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Not the Best Man
programme.desc: Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) is prompted to tell Steve (Steve Harvey) how she really feels about him while at her best friend's wedding.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Addicted to Love and Whatnot
programme.desc: Regina agrees to a date with Steve's friend (Jonathan Slocum) if Steve will return the favor to one of hers.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - J-O-R-D-A-N Spells Funny
programme.desc: Jordan tries comedy as a way of overcoming stage fright; Vanessa makes a documentary about her home life.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Make Room for Caddy
programme.desc: Despite Bernie's offer to buy him a car, Wanda's father cannot get along with him; showing when they all met.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Saving Sergeant Tompkins
programme.desc: Bernie realizes he may have been too truthful when telling Jordan about his father; he amends the truth to make Jordan think well of his father.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - It's Mac-ademic

programme.title: Chaos to Calm - For Better or Worse
programme.desc: A newly engaged couple attempt to merge their space, but they are already having spats over who gets which real estate in the closet; this is a small space with big organizational needs, so space planning is going to be a huge part of the solution.

programme.title: In Touch With Dr. Charles Stanley
programme.desc: Charles Stanley, pastor of the First Baptist Church in Atlanta, shares his insights on Christian faith and enlightens viewers with spiritual motivation.

programme.title: Sugar Mommas
programme.desc: Sisters Sheila and Lynn have loved sweets their entire life, so when they decided to start a business it came naturally to own a bakery. The sisters asked close friend Tommi to join them as their specialty pie maker.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Simple Soul of Savannah
programme.desc: Chef Rachel Silvers is changing how we think about soul food; self-taught and driven, she puts a healthier spin on classics with dishes like meatless cabbage and collards, fried whiting and pot roast.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Narra Tree
programme.desc: A tight-knit group of Filipino friends opened Narra Tree, Savannah's first Filipino restaurant; their menu is packed with soul, oxtail kare-kare and pork sisig carry stories of tradition, resilience and shared dreams.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Okan
programme.desc: Chef Bernard Bennett brings the African diaspora to fine dining with West African and Caribbean-inspired dishes, such as djon djon noodles and pork belly griot; Okan honors a legacy that Savannah knows, one of resilience, rhythm and reinvention.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Klom Klom
programme.desc: In a quiet corner of Savannah, Klom Klom Thai has become a magnet for locals and celebrities alike; chef Ann Healy and PJ introduce rare Northern Thai dishes like duck Chiang Mai khao soi and boat noodles that aren't easy to find.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Narobia's Grits And Gravy
programme.desc: Step into Narobia's, and you're stepping into a family reunion; chef Renée Reid and daughter Sieda serve up classics like liver and onions and shrimp and grits drenched in their signature gravy; it's more than breakfast, it's history on a plate.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Lili's Restaurant
programme.desc: Chef Mir Ali brings his global upbringing to the table at Lili's, named after his daughter; this Savannah gem fuses Southern comfort with South Asian and French influences, crafting dishes like curry crab cakes and tandoori-spiced lamb.

programme.title: City Eats: Atlanta - Low Country Steak
programme.desc: Zak Wallace visits G. Garvin's restaurant, Low Country Steak.

programme.title: City Eats: Atlanta - Sea Salt Seafood Lounge
programme.desc: Zak Wallace introduces viewers to Sea Salt and has a sit-down conversation with music icons.

programme.title: She's Not Our Sister
programme.desc: After three sisters bury their father, family secrets are revealed that will alter their lives forever. But things really take a turn when a will is discovered that reveals that things are not as black and white as they thought them to be.

programme.title: Jam Session - Syleena Johnson
programme.desc: Singer-songwriter Syleena Johnson graces the stage with her dynamic vocal range and emotional storytelling through music.

programme.title: Jam Session - Kyante'
programme.desc: Independent artist Kyante' takes the Jam Session stage with her unique blend of RAndB, soul, and pop influences; through her captivating performances and relatable lyrics, she is an up-and-coming artist to watch in the RAndB and soul music scene.

programme.title: Tracklist Live - Marquel Deljuan
programme.desc: Marquel Deljuan delivers an intentional live performance while opening up about his life journey through his music.

programme.title: Tracklist Live - Ronny Cash
programme.desc: Ronny Cash brings heart and heat to the stage, blending smooth vocals, sonic brilliance by pushing the boundaries of contemporary music.

programme.title: The Set - Tank And The Bangas
programme.desc: Tank and the Bangas, NPR's Tiny Desk Winner, share their music, their story and their journey; known for their huge social media following and energetic shows, they are making a huge splash with fans all around the world.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - North Carolina AAndT State University
programme.desc: The NCAT HBCU marching band, also known as the Blue and Gold Marching Machine, provides an inside look into how they prepare on their journey to the Battle of the Bands.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - Tennessee State University
programme.desc: The TSU HBCU marching band shares pivotal components of their secrets to success from the eyes of the band members and their leaders; they prepare for the Battle of the Bands.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Who's That Lady?
programme.desc: Dr. Phil McGraw counsels Bernie on how to deal with Wanda, who feels left out after Bernie and the guys draft a woman (Mo'Nique) into their group.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Mac-Inations
programme.desc: Neighbor Carl Reiner (guest starring as himself) plays the ultimate practical joke on Bernie. Ashton Kutcher guest stars as himself.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - That Old Mac Magic
programme.desc: American Idol judges Paula Abdul and Randy Jackson critique Bernie's commercial.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Talk
programme.desc: Bernie stops by the Playboy Mansion to get advice from Hugh Hefner on how to talk to Jordan about sex.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Five Stages of Bryana
programme.desc: Bernie and Wanda seek a child therapist's help in figuring out why Bryana has become a bully; Wanda winds up caring for a guinea pig Bernie bought for Bryana.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - My Privacy
programme.desc: Bernie realizes Bryana and Jordan are too old to share a room, so he moves her in with Vanessa, who is less than thrilled.

programme.title: The Harlem Globetrotters: Secrets of the City - Bali
programme.desc: Join Splash and Too Tall in the wonders of Bali where they plunge into the elemental mystical world of Balinese spirituality, uncover how a cute critter crafts one of the priciest coffees on Earth, buddy up with elephants.

programme.title: The Harlem Globetrotters: Secrets of the City - Limon
programme.desc: Embark on a wild escapade with the Harlem Globetrotters, Thunder and Jet as they unravel the rich tapestry of the diaspora and indigenous black natives of Limón, Costa Rica. They swing through the lush jungles, stumble upon one-of-a-kind beaches.

programme.desc: A hardworking man's inability to say no to a beautiful woman gets him in trouble when he agrees to steal $68,000.

programme.title: Good Mourning (2022)
programme.desc: A movie star must choose between pursuing his one true love or landing a life-changing role in a film.

programme.title: Maniac (2012)
programme.desc: A serial killer (Elijah Wood) removes his victims' scalps and attaches them to the vintage mannequins he restores in his late mother's shop.

programme.title: Snag (2023)
programme.desc: After learning the woman he once loved is being held captive by ruthless gangsters, a lone wolf seeks out allies and storms into a world of violence to rescue her.

programme.title: World Trade Center (2006)
programme.desc: Two Port Authority officers become trapped in the rubble of the World Trade Center after going in to help people escape from the buildings during the terrorist attacks of September 11, 2001.

programme.title: The Gambler (2014)
programme.desc: A literature professor (Mark Wahlberg) with gambling debts borrows money from a mobster (Michael Kenneth Williams) and offers his life as collateral while immersing himself in an illicit, underground world.

programme.title: Flight of the Intruder (1991)
programme.desc: Two Navy pilots (Willem Dafoe, Brad Johnson) hatch a rogue mission to bomb Hanoi with a special low-altitude plane.

programme.title: Stop-Loss (2008)
programme.desc: A soldier (Ryan Phillippe) whose tour of duty has ended takes matters into his own hands when the Army tries to force him back into active duty in Iraq.

programme.title: Danger Close (2019)
programme.desc: Australian and New Zealand soldiers face overwhelming odds as they fight for their lives during the Battle of Long Tan in Vietnam.

programme.title: Southpaw (2015)
programme.desc: After losing everything to a senseless tragedy, a boxer (Jake Gyllenhaal) turns to a retired fighter (Forest Whitaker) for guidance as he struggles toward redemption.

programme.title: Molly's Game (2017)
programme.desc: Molly Bloom runs the world's most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested by the FBI. Her only ally is defense lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learns that there is much more to Molly than the tabloids lead people to believe.

programme.title: The Gambler (2014)
programme.desc: A literature professor (Mark Wahlberg) with gambling debts borrows money from a mobster (Michael Kenneth Williams) and offers his life as collateral while immersing himself in an illicit, underground world.

programme.title: Fatman (2020)
programme.desc: After receiving a lump of coal in his stocking, a disgruntled 12-year-old hires a highly skilled assassin to kill Santa Claus.

programme.title: Masterminds (2016)
programme.desc: An armored-car driver (Zach Galifianakis) helps a flirty co-worker (Kristen Wiig) and her friends pull off a heist, then finds himself holding the bag after they double-cross him.

programme.title: The Dictator (2012)
programme.desc: A North African tyrant (Sacha Baron Cohen) risks his life to ensure that democracy never comes to the country he so lovingly oppresses.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victim's daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: John Carpenter's Escape From L.A. (1996)
programme.desc: The fascist U.S. president enlists a jailed war hero (Kurt Russell) to retrieve a top-secret device stolen by his daughter on island Los Angeles in 2013.

programme.title: Walking Out (2017)
programme.desc: When a city teen travels to Montana to go hunting with his estranged father, the trip becomes a battle for survival when they encounter a grizzly bear.

programme.title: Breakdown (1997)
programme.desc: A man's (Kurt Russell) wife (Kathleen Quinlan) disappears in the desert Southwest after accepting a trucker's (J.T. Walsh) help with car trouble.

programme.title: Taken (2008)
programme.desc: A former government operative comes out of retirement and uses all his extensive training to rescue his estranged daughter from a slave trade operation.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers (2006)
programme.desc: Some of the servicemen who raised the U.S. flag on Mount Suribachi during the Battle of Iwo Jima at the end of World War II live to hear of their status as heroes.

programme.title: The Hurricane (1999)
programme.desc: Aided by a Brooklyn teen (Vicellous Reon Shannon) and three Canadians, boxer Rubin Carter (Denzel Washington) fights to be exonerated after long imprisonment for murders he did not commit.

programme.title: The Outlaws (2024)
programme.desc: A group of outlaws awaken to their empty train heist bag. Interrogations begin as each cowboy becomes the focus in an attempt to unmask the thief among them. Tensions mount as each bandit struggles to clear their name before bullets fly.

programme.title: Witness (1985)
programme.desc: An eight-year-old Amish boy witnesses a drug-related murder in a Philadelphia train station. The Philadelphia police captain discovers that the murderers are cops trying to squelch a corruption investigation.

programme.title: Taken (2008)
programme.desc: A former government operative comes out of retirement and uses all his extensive training to rescue his estranged daughter from a slave trade operation.

programme.title: Homefront (2013)
programme.desc: A former DEA agent (Jason Statham) returns to action to save his daughter and his new town from a drug-dealing sociopath (James Franco).

programme.title: Old Guy (2024)
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn they're being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: The Comeback Trail (2020)
programme.desc: Indebted to a mobster, a desperate producer tries to "accidentally" kill an aging movie star for an insurance scam. However, he soon begins to realize that the film they're shooting is a masterpiece in the making.

programme.title: Super (2010)
programme.desc: After his wife (Liv Tyler) leaves him, a fry cook (Rainn Wilson) emulates a TV superhero and transforms himself into a costumed vigilante.

programme.title: Swingers (1996)
programme.desc: Would-be sultans of coolness help a socially inept friend find romance as they strut through Hollywood and Las Vegas.

programme.title: Son of Rambow (2007)
programme.desc: Though polar opposites, two schoolboys in the 1980s England work together on a homemade action film inspired by "Rambo: First Blood."

programme.title: Waking Up in Reno (2002)
programme.desc: A married man (Billy Bob Thornton) has an affair with his best friend's wife (Charlize Theron) while both couples travel from Arkansas to Nevada.

programme.title: Grudge Match (2013)
programme.desc: A boxing promoter (Kevin Hart) offers two rival boxers (Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone) the chance to come out of retirement for one final bout.

programme.title: Breach (2020)
programme.desc: Fleeing a devastating plague on Earth, an interstellar ark comes under attack from a new threat -- a shape-shifting alien force intent on slaughtering what's left of humanity.

programme.title: Face/Off (1997)
programme.desc: An FBI agent (John Travolta) and his nemesis (Nicolas Cage) trade physical identities.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger (1994)
programme.desc: An acting CIA chief (Harrison Ford) learns the president has triggered a war with Colombian drug cartels.

programme.title: The General's Daughter (1999)
programme.desc: Two investigators (John Travolta, Madeleine Stowe) find an underworld of sex and cover-ups behind an Army captain's murder.

programme.title: Borrego (2022)
programme.desc: After witnessing a drug mule's plane crash in the Borrego desert, Elly is kidnapped and forced on a dangerous journey to a remote drop-off point.

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Backcountry (2014)
programme.desc: A couple (Missy Peregrym, Jeff Roop) on a deep-wilderness hike become hopelessly lost within an aggressive black bear's territory.

programme.title: End of Sentence (2019)
programme.desc: After being released from prison, a young man reluctantly embarks on a journey with his estranged father to spread his mother's ashes in her native Ireland.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment (1983)
programme.desc: A strong-willed woman (Shirley MacLaine) and her equally independent daughter (Debra Winger) keep the lines of communication open as each deals with the curveballs life throws at them.

programme.title: The Friend (2024)
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renée Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Jenny's Wedding (2015)
programme.desc: When Jenny (Katherine Heigl) decides to marry a woman (Alexis Bledel), her conventional family must accept who she is or risk losing her forever.

programme.title: Death Becomes Her (1992)
programme.desc: An actress (Meryl Streep) and an author (Goldie Hawn) fight over a plastic surgeon (Bruce Willis) and the secret of eternal beauty.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: An Unfinished Life (2005)
programme.desc: Old wounds get a chance to heal when a Wyoming rancher (Robert Redford) shelters his abused daughter-in-law (Jennifer Lopez) and her child.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renée Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: The First Wives Club (1996)
programme.desc: Three 50-ish college friends (Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton) plot revenge after their husbands dump them for younger women.

programme.title: Death Becomes Her (1992)
programme.desc: An actress (Meryl Streep) and an author (Goldie Hawn) fight over a plastic surgeon (Bruce Willis) and the secret of eternal beauty.

programme.title: Queen Bees (2021)
programme.desc: While her house undergoes repairs, fiercely independent senior Helen temporarily moves into a nearby retirement community, where she encounters lusty widows, cutthroat bridge tournaments and a hotbed of bullying "mean girls."

programme.title: The Night Clerk (2020)
programme.desc: A hotel clerk becomes the prime suspect when a woman is murdered during his shift. As the police investigation closes in, he makes a personal connection with a guest -- but soon realizes he must stop the killer before she becomes the next victim.

programme.title: Don't Knock Twice (2016)
programme.desc: A mother looking to reconnect with her estranged daughter attracts the attention of a demonic witch.

programme.title: La Madrina: The Savage Life of Lorine Padilla (2020)
programme.sub-title: La Madrina: The Savage Life of Lorine Padilla (2020)
programme.desc: Lorine Padilla joins a street gang in the Bronx, N.Y., before becoming an activist and spiritual adviser.

programme.title: Jenny's Wedding (2015)
programme.desc: When Jenny (Katherine Heigl) decides to marry a woman (Alexis Bledel), her conventional family must accept who she is or risk losing her forever.

programme.title: I, Daniel Blake (2016)
programme.desc: While fighting to keep his welfare benefits, a widowed British carpenter (Dave Johns) begins to develop a strong bond with a destitute, single mother (Hayley Squires) who's struggling to take care of her two children.

programme.title: Certain Women (2016)
programme.desc: Three strong-willed women (Kristen Stewart, Laura Dern, Michelle Williams) strive to forge their own paths amidst the wide-open plains of the American Northwest.

programme.title: Failure to Launch (2006)
programme.desc: The parents of a young man (Matthew McConaughey) who still lives at home hire a beautiful woman (Sarah Jessica Parker) to entice him to finally leave the nest.

programme.title: The Guilt Trip (2012)
programme.desc: Pressured into taking his overbearing mother along for the ride, a man embarks on the road trip of a lifetime.

programme.title: Shall We Dance? (2004)
programme.desc: A married Chicago attorney (Richard Gere) takes dancing lessons with a beautiful woman (Jennifer Lopez) he saw through a window.

programme.title: Chocolat (2000)
programme.desc: The mayor opposes a single mother (Juliette Binoche) who is opening a chocolate shop in his 1950s French village across from a church during Lent.

programme.title: Election (1999)
programme.desc: Tracy faces no competition in her high school election, but the civics teacher intervenes by encouraging the varsity football player to run for president, resulting in chaos.

programme.title: Doin' It (2024)
programme.desc: Moonlighting as a high-school substitute teacher, a 30-year-old virgin gets in over her head when she's assigned to teach sex education.

programme.title: A Bad Moms Christmas (2017)
programme.desc: As if creating the perfect Christmas for their families isn't hard enough, under-appreciated and overburdened moms Amy, Kiki and Carla will have to do it while hosting and entertaining their own respective mothers during the holidays.

programme.title: Shell (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: Would You Rather (2012)
programme.desc: Iris (Brittany Snow) and seven other desperate people become trapped in Shepard's (Jeffrey Combs) mansion. Shepard forces them to play a sadistic game for a large sum of money -- but the dilemmas become increasingly deadly.

programme.title: Run (2025)
programme.desc: Smugglers, the police, locals and tourists get drawn into a dangerous web of survival, sacrifice and shifting loyalties as Europe faces a surge in migration.

programme.title: Chocolat (2000)
programme.desc: The mayor opposes a single mother (Juliette Binoche) who is opening a chocolate shop in his 1950s French village across from a church during Lent.
